interactions.title: Drug interactions
interactions.subtitle: Check a prescription for safety before validating it.
interactions.checkerHelp: Add the medications or INNs of the prescription: interactions are detected automatically.
interactions.inputPlaceholder: Medication name or INN (e.g. warfarin, ibuprofen…)
interactions.medicationsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No medication} one {# medication} other {# medications}}
interactions.noneAdded: Add at least two medications to run the check.
interactions.noInteraction: No interaction detected between the medications entered.
interactions.noInteractionHint: The absence of an alert does not replace clinical judgment: this reference base is not exhaustive.
interactions.detectedTitle: {count, plural, one {# interaction detected} other {# interactions detected}}
interactions.disclaimer: Decision-support tool. It does not replace the prescriber's judgment or a complete drug database.
interactions.referenceHelp: Database of known interactions, browsable and filterable.
interactions.referenceEmpty: No interaction in the reference base.
